untranslatable_reason: Signal requires model-level metrics (true positive rates, asymmetry ratio) that are not price/technical indicators. The conditions 'Model true positive rate (down)', 'Model true positive rate (up)', and 'Asymmetry ratio' cannot be expressed using the allowed indicators (price, moving averages, RSI, ATR, Bollinger, MACD, ADX, Stochastic, Donchian, Pivots, Volume, Position, Previous Bar, Returns, Bar Properties). These are external machine learning model outputs, not real-time tradeable signals.
translation_notes: This signal is a meta-rule about model performance asymmetry, not a technical trading rule. It would require integration with a live model pipeline that outputs TPR metrics per direction. A backtest engine would need custom extension to handle model performance conditions.
